name: The Night Is Ours — WCEU After-Party
description: WCEU 2026 closing party at Forty Kleparz, a 19th-century Austro-Hungarian fortress north of the Old Town. Two live music stages, complimentary drinks on arrival, open-air BBQ, karaoke, vaulted casemates inside and open courtyards outside.
notes: Doors 20:00 · last call 04:00 · Sat Jun 6, 2026. WordCamp badge serves as entry — no separate ticket. Two complimentary drinks included with badge. Same evening: Kraków's Dragon Parade affects street traffic around the Old Town and Vistula riverbank — plan transport accordingly.

items.name: Vaulted fortress casemates inside, courtyards outside
Two complimentary drinks per badge on arrival
Heads-up
items.description: Dragon Parade same evening — Old Town traffic affected
